variables.data_type:
First Nation Police Services were not required to report use of force data, as they were not governed by the Community Safety and Policing Act, 2019 (CSPA) and the USE OF FORCE AND WEAPONS (O. Reg. 391/23)

This variable consolidates multiple form fields into a single field, containing the names of municipal police services, a provincial police service, and one first nation police service.

Nishnawbe Aski Police Service opted in as of Dec 10th, 2024. In the future, more First Nation police services may opt in into the CSPA.

variables.data_type:
The supervisor of a containment team, tactical unit or hostage rescue team, or an officer designated by the supervisor, may submit a report on behalf of the unit or team members if, during an operational deployment of the unit’s or team’s emergency response functions, and acting under the command of the supervisor, one or more members do any of the following:
a) draws a handgun in the presence of a member of the public;
b) points a firearm at a Individual;
c) draws and displays a conducted energy weapon to a Individual with the intention of achieving compliance.
d) points a conducted energy weapon at a Individual. 

"Other" may apply to a group of officers who respond jointly to a call and who may not be members of a dedicated or specialized team.

The O. Reg. 391/23: USE OF FORCE AND WEAPONS regulation (s. 15(4)) under CSPA also establishes reporting requirements for public order teams

Mandatory IF Report Type = "Team".

variables.data_type:
To reduce the risk of re-identification, for privacy considerations, the following assignment types have been grouped into the category "Targeted Community Response Units/Hostage Rescue":
- Community Liaison, School Resource
- Community Oriented/Directed Response
- Hostage Rescue
- Mental Health Response Unit/Mobile Crisis Response Team.

Additionally, the following assignment types have been grouped into the category "Tactical/ Containment/Hostage Rescue"
- Containment 
- Hostage Rescue 
- Tactical

The data values below correspond to the follwing values in the Use of Force Report.:

Administrative = Administrative such as  station duty, etc.
Guns and Gangs = Guns and Gangs, ROPE, Other Specialized Units
Investigations =Investigations (CIB, Other Major Crime)
Patrol=Patrol (e.g., general, foot, bicycle, ATV, snowmobile)

ATV = All-Terrain Vehicle.
ROPE = Repeat Offender Parole Enforcement.

variables.data_type:
Incidents involving Humane Destruction of Animal do not involve members of the public, therefore they are not part of race-based analysis.

To reduce the risk of re-identification, for privacy considerations, incidents involving: 
- Barricaded Individual
- Disturbance (e.g., noise complaint, unknown trouble, unwanted Individual)
- Individual in Crisis (e.g., mental health, suicide threat), and
- Wellness/Safety Check
have been  grouped under the category "Barricaded Individual/Disturbance/Individual in Crisis/Wellness/Safety Check" and incidents involving:
- Intimate Partner Violence (IPV)/Dispute, and
- Violent Crime (non-IPV) (e.g., assault, car-jacking, robbery, homicide) 
 have been grouped under the category "Violent Crime (including Intimate Partner Violence)".

Assisting Other /Agency (e.g., EMS, animal welfare inspectors)
Executing Warrant (e.g., DNA, arrest, search)
Investigation (follow-up, ongoing)
Other Federal/Provincial Statutes (e.g., LLA)
Police Custody Related (e.g. prisoner control, fingerprinting, lock-up area)
Traffic (e.g., RIDE, vehicle collision)

variables.label: Individual or Animal Interaction
variables.definition: Specifies if the report involved interaction with  a Individual or animal
variables.values:
Interaction with Individual(s)
No Interaction with Individual(s)
Interaction with Animal
variables.data_type:
The variable collected from the Use of Force Report. was called "partA_numberSubjects" with the options 1,2 and 3 corresponding to the type of interaction with either individual(s) or animal.
1=Interaction with individual(s)
2=No Interaction with individual(s)
3=Interaction with animal only. 

Option 1 (Interaction with individual(s)) may be used in a situation where the officer used reportable force (as per regulation O. Reg. 391/23: USE OF FORCE AND WEAPONS | https://www.ontario.ca/laws/regulation/r23391) on one or more individuals.

Option 2 (No Interaction with individual(s)) may be used in a situation where the officer responded to an incident with their handgun drawn in the presence of a member(s) of the public, but the subject fled without their being able to observe, identify or interact with them.

Option 3 (Interaction with animal only) may be used in a situation when the officer used force (e.g., CEW or firearm) to defend themselves against an aggressive animal. This option should not be confused with humane destruction of an animal which can be selected under “Incident Type”.

This variable was renamed to make it easier for the user to understand.
Mandatory IF Incident Type is not equal to "Humane Destruction of Animal".

variables.label: Row ID

variables.data_type: This variable cannot be used to link datasets, as the same _id will likely represent different records across different datasets.

variables.label: Batch File Name

variables.data_type: This is an internal autogenerated identifier based on the report submission ID. This is a linking variable between UoF_Main_Records, UoF_Individual_Records, UoF_Weapon_Records, UoF_Probe_Records Tables
variables.label_fr: Nom du ficher du lot
variables.definition_fr: Identificateur unique de chaque rapport de recours à la force transmis

variables.label: Individual Index
variables.definition: Index for each of the individuals on whom reportable use of force was used, within a Use of Force Report..
variables.data_type:
Mandatory IF the report is for 1 Individual or more. This is a linking variable between UoF_Individual_Records,  UoF_Weapon_Records and UoF_Probe_Records Tables.
The Individual Index may not correspond to the Number of Individuals in the UoF_Main_Records.csv file. This discrepancy arises when, in the analysis stage, records are removed from the UoF_Individual_Records.csv file as the individual(s) do not qualify as reportable use of force being applied. Consequently, the Individual Index count may be higher than the number of individual records in the  UoF_Individual_Records.csv file.
variables.label_fr: Index individuel
variables.definition_fr: Index pour chacune des personnes envers qui un recours à la force devant être déclaré a été utilisé, au sein d’un rapport sur le recours à la force.

variables.label: Race
variables.definition: Race category that best describes the individual(s), as perceived by the officer at the time the decision was made to use force
variables.values:
Black
East/Southeast Asian 
Indigenous 
Latino 
Middle Eastern 
South Asian 
White
variables.data_type:
The officer’s assessment of racial identity during the incident was informed by observable characteristics such as skin tone, hair texture, and facial structure, along with additional contextual information (neighbourhood, previous knowledge, etc.) that could influence perceptions of an individual’s racial background.
The race categories are in accordance with the Standards for Participant Observer Information of Race, included in the Ontario's Anti Racism Data Standards.
Mandatory IF the report is for 1 Individual or more.

variables.definition: Specifies whether the reporting officer issued the police challenge before pointing or discharging a handgun, rifle and/or lethal shotgun
variables.data_type: Mandatory IF the report is for 1 Individual or more AND Type of force used is "Firearm" AND the Firearm (either Handgun, Rifle or Shotgun(Lethal)) was Pointed OR Discharged.
variables.label_fr: Type de force utilisée - Arme à feu - Mise en garde policière
variables.definition_fr: Précise si l’agent responsable du rapport a émis une mise en garde policière avant de pointer ou de décharger une arme de poing, une carabine ou un fusil de chasse létal

variables.label: Type Force Used - Firearm - Comply
variables.definition: Specifies whether the individual complied when the reporting office issued the police challenge
variables.data_type: Mandatory IF the report is for 1 Individual or more AND Type of force used is "Firearm" AND the Firearm (either Handgun, Rifle or Shotgun(Lethal)) was Pointed OR Discharged AND the Police Challenge was issued.
variables.label_fr: Type de force utilisée - Arme à feu - Obtempère
variables.definition_fr: Précise si la personne a obtempéré lorsque l’agent responsable du rapport a émis la mise en garde.

variables.data_type:

variables.label_fr: Type de force utilisée - Arme À Feu - Pas de mise en garde - Pourquoi Pas - Autre

variables.label: Individual Injuries - Physical Injuries
variables.definition: Specifies whether the individual(s) sustained physical injuries as a result of the force applied by the reporting officer
variables.data_type:
Mandatory IF the report is for 1 Individual or more.
Don't Know = individual fled/escaped, etc.
variables.label_fr: Blessures de la personne - Blessures physiques
variables.definition_fr: Précise si la ou les personnes ont subi des blessures physiques à la suite du recours à la force de l’agent responsable du rapport.

variables.label: Individual Injuries - Treatment - None
variables.definition: Specifies whether the individual(s) needed no treatment for the injury caused by the reporting officer's use of force
variables.data_type:
At least one of 7 single (IF this specific option is selected, no other additional options can be selected) or multi-select options is mandatory IF Report Type = "Individual" AND there were Individual involved injuries because of the use of force applied.
Blank = Not selected.
variables.label_fr: Blessures de la personne - Traitement - Aucun
variables.definition_fr: Précise si la ou les personnes n’ont pas eu besoin de traitement pour la blessure causée par le recours à la force par l’agent responsable du rapport.

variables.label: Individual Injuries - Treatment - First Aid
variables.definition: Specifies whether the individual(s) needed first aid treatment for the injury caused by the reporting officer's use of force
variables.data_type:
At least one of 7 single or multi-select options is mandatory IF Report Type = "Individual" AND there were Individual involved injuries because of the use of force applied.
Blank =Not selected.
variables.label_fr: Blessures de la personne - Traitement - Premiers soins
variables.definition_fr: Précise si la ou les personnes ont eu besoin de premiers soins pour la blessure causée par le recours à la force par l’agent responsable du rapport.

variables.label: Individual Injuries - Treatment - Medical Personnel at Scene

variables.data_type:
At least one of 7 single or multi-select options is mandatory IF Report Type = "Individual" AND there were Individual involved injuries because of the use of force applied
Blank =Not selected
variables.label_fr: Blessures de la personne - Traitement - Personnel médical sur les lieux
variables.definition_fr: Précise si la ou les personnes ont eu besoin de soins médicaux dispensés par le personnel sur les lieux pour la blessure causée par le recours à la force par l’agent responsable du rapport.

variables.label: Individual Injuries - Treatment - Admission at Medical Facility

variables.data_type:
At least one of 7 single or multi-select options is mandatory IF Report Type = "Individual" AND there were Individual involved injuries because of the use of force applied.
Blank =Not selected.
variables.label_fr: Blessures de la personne - Traitement - Admission dans un établissement médical
variables.definition_fr: Précise si la ou les personnes ont eu besoin d’être admises dans un établissement médical pour la blessure causée par le recours à la force par l’agent responsable du rapport.

variables.label: Individual Injuries - Treatment - at Medical Facility
variables.definition: Specifies whether the individual(s) needed medical attention at a facility for the injury caused by the reporting officer's use of force
variables.data_type:
At least one of 7 single or multi-select options is mandatory IF Report Type = "Individual" AND there were Individual involved injuries because of the use of force applied.
Blank =Not selected.
variables.label_fr: Blessures de la personne - Traitement - dans un établissement médical
variables.definition_fr: Précise si la ou les personnes ont eu besoin de soins médicaux dans un établissement pour la blessure causée par le recours à la force par l’agent responsable du rapport.

variables.label: Individual Injuries - Treatment - Unknown
variables.definition: Specifies whether the requirement for treatment for the injury caused by the reporting officer's use of force was unknown
variables.data_type:
At least one of 7 single (IF this specific option is selected, no other additional options can be selected) or multi-select options is mandatory IF Report Type = "Individual" AND there were Individual involved injuries because of the use of force applied.
Blank = Not selected.
variables.label_fr: Blessures de la personne - Traitement - Inconnu
variables.definition_fr: Précise si le besoin de traitement est inconnu pour la blessure causée par le recours à la force de l’agent responsable du rapport.

variables.label: Individual Injuries - Treatment - Other

variables.label: Row ID
variables.definition: This variable is auto-generated when the dataset is uploaded to the Ontario Data Catalogue
variables.data_type: This variable cannot be used to link datasets, as the same _id will likely represent different records across different datasets.
variables.label_fr: ID de ligne
variables.definition_fr: Cette variable est générée automatiquement lorsque l’ensemble de données est téléversé dans le Catalogue de données de l’Ontario

variables.label: Batch File Name
variables.definition: Unique identifier for each Use of Force Report. submitted
variables.data_type: This is an internal autogenerated identifier based on the report submission ID. This is a linking variable between UoF_Main_Records, UoF_Individual_Records, UoF_Weapon_Records, UoF_Probe_Records Tables.
variables.label_fr: Nom du ficher du lot
variables.definition_fr: Identificateur unique de chaque rapport de recours à la force transmis

variables.label: Individual Index
variables.definition: Index for each of the individuals on whom reportable use of force was used, within a Use of Force Report..
variables.data_type: Mandatory IF the report is for 1 Individual or more. This is a linking variable between UoF_Individual_Records,  UoF_Weapon_Records and UoF_Probe_Records Tables.
variables.label_fr: Index individuel
variables.definition_fr: Index pour chacune des personnes envers qui un recours à la force devant être déclaré a été utilisé, au sein d’un rapport sur le recours à la force.

variables.label: Individual Weapon Index
variables.definition: Index of each weapon that a single individual was perceived to be in possession of, within a Use of Force Report.
variables.data_type: This variable was created to differentiate unique records when an individual was perceived to possess multiple weapons of the same type. It is not information that is collected from the Use of Force Report.
variables.label_fr: Index des armes individuelles
variables.definition_fr: Indice de chaque arme qu'un individu a été perçu comme étant en possession.

variables.label: Weapon Type
variables.definition: Type of weapon(s) the individual was perceived/believed to have or have access to
variables.values:
Aerosol
Canine
Club or Impact Weapon
Handgun
Long Gun
Knife/Edged
Vehicle
Unknown Type of Weapon
Other
DATA NOT AVAILABLE
variables.data_type:
Mandatory IF the report is for 1 Individual or more AND Individual was perceived/believed to have access to a weapon(s).

Long Gun includes rifle and shotgun.
variables.label_fr: Type d'arme
variables.definition_fr: Type d'arme que l’on soupçonnait/croyait que la personne pouvait avoir en sa possession ou auxquelles elle pouvait avoir accès

variables.label: Weapon Location
variables.definition: Location of the weapon(s) the individual was perceived/believed to have or have access to
variables.values:
Accessible
In Hand
On Individual
DATA NOT AVAILABLE
<Blank>
variables.data_type:
Mandatory IF the report is for 1 Individual or more AND Individual was perceived/believed to have access to a weapon(s) other than Canine or Vehicle. Single-selection only.
On Individual includes concealed.
Weapon Location is not applicable to Weapon Types: Canine and Vehicle. These records are assigned a <Blank> value.
variables.label_fr: Emplacement de l’arme
variables.definition_fr: Emplacement des armes que l’on soupçonnait/croyait que la personne pouvait avoir en sa possession ou auxquelles elle pouvait avoir accès

variables.label: Cartridge Probe Cycles
variables.definition: Specifies the cycles used in each deployment mode for the conducted energy weapon
variables.values:
Single Cycle (5 seconds) 
Extended Cycle (more than 5 seconds) 
Multiple Cycles
Missing Data
variables.data_type: At least one of 3 single-select options is mandatory IF the report is for 1 Individual or more AND the type of force used is "Intermediate Weapon' AND the weapon used is "Conducted Energy Weapon (CEW)" AND Weapon was Discharged AND deployment mode was "Cartridge/Probe".
variables.label_fr: Cycles de la cartouche/sonde
variables.definition_fr: Précise le nombre de cycles utilisés pour chaque mode de déploiement de l’arme à impulsions.
